description_long: This is a round, double-layered chocolate cake with a smooth, glossy chocolate ganache coating that drips slightly over the edge. The top is decorated with six large, evenly spaced swirls of chocolate frosting, each with a glossy finish. Scattered across the top are small, irregular chocolate chunks, adding texture and visual interest. The lower layer is a lighter brown, suggesting a different cake or filling, while the upper layer is covered entirely in chocolate. The cake appears dense and moist, with a rich, indulgent appearance. There are no visible candles or additional decorations, and the cake is not displayed on any plate or stand.
description: A double-layered chocolate cake with glossy ganache, chocolate swirls, and chocolate chunk decorations on top. The cake has a rich, indulgent look with a smooth finish and no visible container.
description_view_0: Front view showing six chocolate swirls and a glossy ganache drip, with chocolate chunks scattered on top.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the same six swirls, with the ganache drip and chocolate chunks more visible on the left side.
description_view_2: Back view with all six chocolate swirls visible, highlighting the smoothness of the ganache and the even distribution of chocolate chunks.
description_view_3: Side view showing the layered structure of the cake and the glossy ganache, with chocolate swirls and chunks clearly visible.
